defs: Praise ye Jehovah; praise ye the Lord; -- an exclamation used chiefly in songs of praise or thanksgiving to God, and as an expression of gratitude or adoration.
quotes: So sung they, and the empyrean rung With Hallelujahs.
In those days, as St. Jerome tells us,“any one as he walked in the fields, might hear the plowman at his hallelujahs.”
